pages.text: The Ultimate Tier Installer instantly upgrades any Mekanism machine to Ultimate tier with a single right-click.

pages.title: Energy
pages.text: The item stores up to $(l)200,000 FE$() of energy. Each machine upgrade consumes $(l)1,000 FE$().$(br)$(br)It can be charged using Mekanism Energy Cubes or any compatible energy charger. The energy bar on the item shows the current charge level.

pages.title: Upgrade Items
pages.text: Upgrading machines requires tier installer items:$(br)$(li)Basic Tier Installer: For single machines → Basic Factory$(li)Advanced Tier Installer: Basic → Advanced$(li)Elite Tier Installer: Advanced → Elite$(li)Ultimate Tier Installer: Elite → Ultimate$(br)$(br)These items are consumed from your inventory first, then from connected networks.

pages.title: AE2 Integration
pages.text: The installer can extract upgrade items from a bound $(l)AE2 network$().$(br)$(br)To bind: Place the installer in a $(l)Wireless Access Point$()'s link slot. The tooltip will show the bound WAP position. Upgrade items will be pulled from the AE2 network when your inventory doesn't have enough.

pages.title: QIO Integration
pages.text: The installer can also extract upgrade items from a bound $(l)QIO frequency$().$(br)$(br)To bind: $(l)Sneak + Right-click$() any QIO block (Drive Array, Dashboard, etc.) that has a frequency selected. The tooltip will show the bound QIO frequency name.

pages.title: Consumption Priority
pages.text: When upgrading, items are consumed in this order:$(br)$(li)1. Player Inventory$(li)2. Bound AE2 Network$(li)3. Bound QIO Frequency$(br)$(br)This allows seamless upgrades across all your storage systems.

pages.title: Area Upgrade Mode
pages.text: Press $(l)Ctrl + Right-click$() to toggle Area Mode. In this mode, right-clicking a machine will upgrade $(l)all connected machines$() (blocks touching each other) to Ultimate tier at once.$(br)$(br)Energy and upgrade items are consumed for each machine upgraded.

pages.title: Crafting
pages.text: The Ultimate Tier Installer is crafted with:$(br)$(li)Top: Ultimate Control Circuit | Teleporter | Ultimate Control Circuit$(li)Middle: Ultimate Mechanical Pipe | Ultimate Energy Cube | Ultimate Mechanical Pipe$(li)Bottom: Polonium Pellet | Structural Glass | Plutonium Pellet
